# Quick Reference Card — ACE-Test-001

> Synthetic training material stub. Written by `training-materials` skill.

## Forms at a Glance

| Form | When to Use | Key Fields |
|------|-------------|------------|
| Beneficiary Registration | New pregnant woman or child under 5 | Name, age, gestational age/DOB, village, phone |
| Prenatal Visit | Monthly prenatal assessment | BP reading, weight, symptoms, risk score, referral Y/N |
| Immunization Visit | Per vaccination schedule | Vaccine given, batch number, next due date, adverse reaction Y/N |
| Danger Sign Referral | Emergency referral | Danger signs (multi-select), facility, transport Y/N |

## Danger Signs — Refer Immediately

**Maternal:** severe headache, blurred vision, vaginal bleeding, convulsions, high fever
**Child:** inability to feed, persistent vomiting, lethargy, difficulty breathing, high fever

## Key Contacts

- LLO Manager: Neal (neal@test.example.com)
- Technical Support: ace@dimagi-ai.com
- Clinical Escalation: District Health Office
